name: money.barker/stablecoin-yield
description: Real-time stablecoin yield index + AI yield advisor + non-custodial execution. Rank vaults by APY/TVL, market overview & trend vs T-bills, pool search/detail/history, cross-chain routes, and ready-to-sign deposit/redeem quotes. For agents, apps, and businesses (payment companies, on/off-ramps, treasuries) parking idle stablecoins for yield.
